title: Lonchitis-aspera polypodioides

It is a type of terrestrial fern commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The classification of Lonchitis-aspera polypodioides includes its rank as a species, genus (Lonchitis), family (Blechnaceae), order (Blechnales), class (Polypodiopsida), division (Pteridophyta), and kingdom (Plantae).
